reviews.comment:
Excelente parador de descanso en la Ruta Nacional 2, aprovecha a cargar tu termo con agua caliente y disfruta de unos sanitarios cómodos y limpios para refrescarte. Parada obligada cuando regresas de Mar del Plata. También cuenta con un excelente minimercado para comprar alguna cosa rica para amenizar tu viaje.

(Translated by Google)
An excellent rest stop on National Route 2. Take advantage of the opportunity to refill your thermos with hot water and enjoy the comfortable, clean restrooms to refresh yourself. A must-stop when returning from Mar del Plata. It also has an excellent convenience store where you can buy something delicious to liven up your trip.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnOF9LRUx3EAE
